name: common_sense_77f1289a-b4b6-4506-9530-3414441c4916
prompt: A serene, modern indoor scene unfolds in a minimalist bedroom, focusing on a sleek white bunk bed as the centerpiece. The video begins with a low-angle, wide shot that captures the entire bunk bed, emphasizing its clean lines and simple design. The lower bunk features a white mattress adorned with a patterned pillow, while the top bunk casts a shadow on the adjacent wall. A curved black ladder leads to the upper bunk, which is partially visible due to the angle. The underside of the top bunk is finished with a warm brown tone.  In the foreground, a dark green-and-white geometric bedside rug lies on a light brown floor, adding a touch of pattern to the otherwise monochromatic space. To the left, a sleek black-framed glass door opens to a porch or balcony, where trees, lawns, and an outdoor wooden table set are visible, allowing natural light to stream in. A portion of a chair can be seen in the bottom left corner, while a gray pot holding a potted plant with dark green stems and lemon-green leaves stands to the far right.  As the camera slowly pedestals upward, the shot transitions to a high-angle view, revealing more of the top bunk and the white ceiling with two round recessed lights. The soft, neutral white glow from these lights complements the natural light coming through the glass door. The video maintains a calm and inviting atmosphere, with the bunk bed serving as the focal point amidst the minimalist decor and natural elements.
